close_reason: E2E greenfield-template test passing - validates full new user workflow
description:
Test scenario: New user onboarding flow

1. Create fresh NixOS container with only nix installed
2. Run 'nix flake init -t github:firefly-engineering/turnkey'
3. Enter devshell (direnv allow)
4. Add Go/Python/Rust hello world code
5. Verify deps files are auto-generated
6. Run 'tk build //...' and 'tk test //...'
7. Verify builds succeed

Validates: template works, onboarding is smooth, all toolchains functional
title: E2E: Greenfield project from template
